text.title: ADR Consequence Evidence Binding Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs a concrete symptom with sourced root-cause and a concrete fix the author can apply.

antipattern.symptom: Consequences section says 'easier to maintain'; no measurement.
antipattern.fix: Reject ADRs whose consequences have no anchor.

antipattern.symptom: Anchor URL returns 404; team cannot re-evaluate.
Anchor exists but no threshold; evidence is unfalsifiable.
antipattern.root-cause: Author measured but did not commit to a target.
antipattern.fix: Validator rejects ADR missing numeric threshold.
